title: League of Legends 15-Minute Statistical Analysis
description: A data science project analyzing 2025 Oracle's Elixir competitive LoL data to predict match outcomes from early game statistics alone. Uses permutation testing, random forest classification, and fairness analysis to explore whether gold, XP, and kill differentials at 15 minutes determine the course of professional matches.

title: Rotten Tomato Critics Sentiment Analysis
description: A sentiment analysis project comparing critic and audience reviews scraped from Rotten Tomatoes across five films. Uses natural language processing to examine tone, word frequency, and rating extremity — exploring whether professional critics are more measured in their language than everyday viewers.

title: Audio Processing & Speech Transcription Limits
description: An object-oriented Python project building an AudioProcessor class that modifies .wav files through pitch, speed, noise, echo, and trimming. Explores how far audio can be distorted before speech-to-text transcription breaks down — and how accuracy degrades with intensity.

title: Mental Illness & Alzheimer's Prediction
description: A group machine learning project investigating whether Alzheimer's diagnosis can be predicted from mental illness severity and socio-demographic factors. Compared Random Forest, KNN, and Naive Bayes classifiers — finding KNN achieved the highest accuracy at 82.1% using age, weight, height, education, and symptom severity as key predictors.

title: MeowMates
description: A Tinder-style web app where you can swipe through adoptable cats. Swipe right to learn more about each cat and access adoption info.
